exercises.name: Air Bike
exercises.reason: Short repeatable effort where the timer matters more than reps.
execution_notes: Build in the first 10 seconds, then hold a strong pace.
Breathe down during the rest block before the next round.

alternatives.name: Recumbent Bike
alternatives.note: Use this if the air bike is unavailable.

exercises.name: Farmer's Walk
exercises.reason: Loaded carry that keeps the timer path active and easy to track on phone.
execution_notes: Walk tall and keep the ribs down.
If space is tight, turn carefully rather than rushing.

alternatives.name: Rickshaw Carry
alternatives.note: Use this if the gym has a loaded carry station.
